prompt: Give my 'Submit the rebate form' to-do a deadline of July 30th.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Submit the rebate form' AND deadline=132808448 AND status=0 AND trashed=0

pseudoScript: things todo update "$(things search "Submit the rebate form" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --deadline 2026-07-30
